metadata.description: The person appears to be a male in their 30s, with a medium skin tone showing some sun exposure and faint texture. Their face is oval with a defined jawline. Their hair is medium-length, wavy, blonde, and styled with a side part, revealing a slightly receding hairline at the temples. Their eyes are dark brown, almond-shaped, and set normally, with medium-thick, slightly arched eyebrows. The nose has a straight bridge and a rounded tip, and the mouth features medium-thick lips. Distinguishing features include a short, neatly trimmed beard and mustache, and several small moles on the cheeks and forehead. The overall appearance suggests a mixed European heritage. The person is smiling broadly with a direct gaze, and their head is angled slightly to the right.
metadata.anchor: Smiling man with blonde hair and short beard.
